category_sources: source_facts.description identifies wllvm as a toolkit for building whole-program LLVM bitcode files; official GitHub README describes WLLVM compiler wrappers for C/C++ bitcode extraction.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and the official repository README use WLLVM/wllvm for the project and command names.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface, covering installation, usage, environment variables, and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub repository is linked from the WLLVM package metadata and README clone instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe whole-program LLVM bitcode generation, compiler wrappers, and extract-bc workflows.
